title: Cyphopsis volubilis
taxonomy: Cyphopsis volubilis is classified within the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as the morning glory family. This family consists of over 60 genera and approximately 1,600 species of flowering plants. Cyphopsis volubilis, specifically, is a species of flowering plant native to tropical regions. The classification of Cyphopsis volubilis is further divided into its order, family, genus, and species levels, providing a comprehensive understanding of its place in the plant kingdom. At the order level, Cyphopsis volubilis is classified under Solanales.
